$comment: Shared type definitions referenced by all front matter schemas via $ref. These formalize the enums, objects, and patterns documented in STYLE_GUIDE.md (Front Matter Conventions).

kebab-case-id.$comment: Lowercase identifier with hyphens, used for stage IDs, artifact names, and feeds_into references.

file-path.$comment: Relative path to a markdown file within the repository (e.g., stages/initiation/checklist.md).

execution-pattern.$comment: Stage lifecycle category: foundational (once per project), iterative (per increment), or continuous (ongoing).

checkpoint-protocol.$comment: The six checkpoint protocols defining how each checkpoint is processed. Describes the execution procedure, not the checkpoint type (Gate/Review/Alignment).

role-id.$comment: Role identifiers from the RACI matrix in guides/framework.md.

checkpoint-object.$comment: A stage checkpoint with protocol, display name, and investment-gate flag. responsible_roles lists who prepares evidence per the Decision-Rights Matrix.

output-object.$comment: A stage output artifact. template points to a fillable template; embedded_in names the parent artifact when this output is a section rather than a standalone file.

autonomy-level.$comment: AI autonomy tier from guides/ai-assistance.md. Determines how much independent action the agent takes.

oversight-intensity.$comment: How closely a human monitors agent work: active (review each step), passive (review outputs), minimal (spot-check only).

working-location-type.$comment: Where the stage's primary work happens: artifacts (docs/ governance files) or source-code (application codebase).

raci-roles.$comment: RACI matrix assignments for a stage. Maps Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed to role-id arrays. Mirrors guides/framework.md.
